title: Finland
description: A short documentary exploring the geography, culture, and daily life of Finland, highlighting its lakes, forests, and Nordic traditions. Produced as part of the Encyclopaedia Britannica Films series.

title: Finland Builds
description: An industrial and architectural documentary showing Finland's post-war reconstruction efforts, featuring modern buildings, factories, and infrastructure projects that symbolised national recovery.

title: Land of the Midnight Sun
description: A travelogue film showcasing Finland's natural beauty under the midnight sun phenomenon, with scenes of Lapland, reindeer herding, and traditional Sami culture in the far north.
creator: Oy Suomi-Filmi Ab

title: The Finnish Farmer
description: Documents rural agricultural life in Finland, depicting traditional farming practices, seasonal work cycles, and the close relationship Finnish farmers maintained with the land and forests.
creator: Oy Suomi-Filmi Ab
subject: Finland

title: Helsinki: City of Design
description: A promotional film celebrating Helsinki as a centre of modern Scandinavian design, showcasing furniture, glassware, ceramics, and architecture that brought Finnish craftsmanship to the world stage.
creator: Finnish Design Council
